response.justification: Maria is a strong generalist with ~19 years of software experience, solid TypeScript/Node.js and cloud (AWS CDK) background, and recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, her GenAI exposure spans roughly one year, falling far short of the required 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and the resume shows no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, AI data pipelines, or evaluation/observability frameworks. Her craftsmanship, mentoring history, and customer-facing workshop experience partially offset the AI gap, making her a borderline candidate for a Staff FDE GenAI role.
strengths: Recent hands-on MCP and AI-agent infrastructure work, directly matching a key technology in the role
Deep full-stack engineering experience (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS) across high-scale production systems
Proven mentoring and stakeholder-facing skills via workshops, courses, and consulting engagements
concerns: Only ~1 year of GenAI/agentic work versus the required 8+ years of AI-driven solution development
No demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
No evidence of leading AI technical discovery or transitioning AI prototypes to production at enterprise customers

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and mentoring track record
